renderDetails.messageTitle: Message from Script and Asset Creator (script_writer)

content:
All 4 files have been created successfully:

## Files Created

### 1. Batch Resize Script
**Path:** `C:\Users\joel0\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\ai-business\scripts\batch_resize.py`
- Resizes images to 5 standard print sizes (5x7, 8x10, 11x14, 16x20, 18x24) at 300 DPI
- Center-crop with aspect ratio preservation using Pillow/LANCZOS
- Outputs JPEG (95% quality) and PNG with embedded DPI metadata
- Full argparse CLI: `python batch_resize.py <source_dir> [--sizes 5x7 8x10] [--formats jpeg png] [--jpeg-quality 90]`
- Creates `sized/` subdirectory tree with per-size folders
- Progress output, error handling, summary report

### 2. PDF Assembler Script
**Path:** `C:\Users\joel0\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\ai-business\scripts\pdf_assembler.py`
- Assembles coloring pages into KDP-ready PDF using only Pillow (no reportlab needed)
- 8.5"×11" trim size (2550×3300 px at 300 DPI)
- Auto-generates title page (centered title + subtitle + author) and copyright page (with AI disclosure)
- Single-sided: each coloring page followed by a blank white page
- 0.25" margins (75px) — art won't touch edges
- Full argparse CLI: `python pdf_assembler.py <source_dir> <output.pdf> --title "Book Title" --author "Author Name"`
- Options: `--no-blanks`, `--no-title-page`, `--no-copyright`, `--subtitle`, `--copyright-text`
- Progress output with file size report

### 3. Coloring Book Prompts
**Path:** `C:\Users\joel0\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\ai-business\prompts\coloring_book_prompts.txt`
- 30 prompt templates optimized for SDXL line art generation
- 6 niches × 5 prompts each: Bold Animals, Dog Breeds, Botanical/Nature, Fantasy/Whimsical, Profession-Specific, Seasonal/Holiday
- Each prompt includes: positive prompt, negative prompt reference, customization notes
- Standard negative prompt provided at top (use with all prompts)
- Bonus section with advanced tips: resolution, consistency, quality control, batch workflow

### 4. Wall Art Prompts
**Path:** `C:\Users\joel0\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\ai-business\prompts\wall_art_prompts.txt`
- 30 prompt templates optimized for Flux model
- 6 niches × 5 prompts each: Botanical/Kitchen, Minimalist Nursery, Abstract Modern, Vintage/Retro, Pet Portraits, Nature/Landscape
- Each prompt includes style notes and customization guidance
- Flux-specific settings (no negative prompts, lower guidance)
- Bonus section with Etsy business tips: listing strategy, pricing, SEO keywords, seasonal calendar
